description: Payment service intermittently returns 502 during peak traffic; DB connection pool appears saturated and app servers are queuing requests.

summary: Search p99 latency regression after deploy
description: Search endpoint p99 latency jumped 4x right after the 14:00 deploy; CPU normal, suspect a new N+1 query path.
Users intermittently logged out; token validation failing for ~5% of requests since the signing key was rotated.
The nightly reconciliation queue is not draining; consumer lag climbing for 3 hours, no errors logged.
/var/log at 92% on three nodes; verbose debug logging left enabled after last incident.
